Partner use case still not finalised. Additional scope identified. On track with the  initial planned items

6th July
Our internal testing is in progress. All the associated teams are also on track for this.

29 Jun
WBS is done. We will start picking this starting from current sprint based on priority.
22 Jun
We identified additional UX around this. We will share more updates on planning once the UX walk through is done.

15 June 2026:
Eng and PM aligned on the asks here. We also identified the schema changes that are needed here. This will be planned starting from next sprint.
